subject: Cannot see my ride history
description: My ride history tab is blank even though I've completed multiple rides. Please help.

subject: Payment was deducted but ride didn't start
description: I was charged 4 TND but the driver cancelled. I haven't received any refund.
resolution: Refund has been processed and should appear within 3-5 business days.

subject: App crashes when opening map view
description: Every time I open the ride map on my Samsung A52, the app crashes immediately.

subject: How do I become a driver?
description: I want to offer rides but I can't find the option to switch my account to driver mode.
resolution: Navigate to Profile > Settings > Switch Role > Driver. You will need to add a vehicle first.

subject: Wrong destination charged
description: My route was 8km but I was charged for a 15km ride. Please review.

subject: Account verification stuck at 80%
description: I submitted my ID two weeks ago but identity verification is still pending.

subject: Notifications not working on iOS
description: I'm not receiving push notifications for new ride requests on my iPhone 13.

subject: Request to delete my account
description: I want to permanently delete my account and all associated data per GDPR.
